bio: I've been doing front-end development for over ten years. I worked with ad agencies in Germany, and now I'm freelancing worldwide — mostly with React, WordPress, and whatever fits the project.
journey: I started with classic HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. These days I focus on modern frameworks, performance, and UX. I care about clean code and interfaces that just feel right.
alwaysLearningDesc: I'm always trying new tools — to work faster and enjoy the process more.

availability.title: Open for projects
availability.subtitle: Got something in mind?
availability.description: I have room for new work right now. Drop me a line and we can see what makes sense to build together.
availability.profileDescription: For me, good design and solid tech go together — it should look great and work reliably.
